response.justification: While the candidate has a strong background in software craftsmanship, distributed systems, and full-stack development, they fall significantly short of the core technical requirements for this role. Specifically, they possess less than one year of professional C++ experience compared to the strictly required 8 years. Additionally, their infrastructure experience leans heavily toward high-level web microservices rather than foundational cloud compute platforms, storage, and hardware architecture.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) demonstrating strong architectural and system design capabilities.
Proven track record of mentoring, leading workshops, and establishing engineering best practices such as TDD and CI/CD.
Experience building and scaling distributed systems, including handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
concerns: Severely lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ programming experience, with only about 7 months of professional exposure.
Background is primarily focused on full-stack web and product engineering rather than deep, low-level cloud compute infrastructure.
Lacks direct experience mentoring specifically within Cloud or DevOps engineering contexts as preferred by the role.
